original_statement: which period had the same number of deaths as the previous year had?
mutated_statement: which period had the same number of something as the previous year had?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization: specific noun "deaths" replaced by vague placeholder "something" (which period had the same number of deaths as the previous year had? → which period had the same number of something as the previous year had?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的judge_thought和chain中的thought可以识别关键信息：Agent直接给出“2000-2005”并解释“1995–2000和2000–2005都为194,000 deaths”。日志文本（如“因此，…是2000-2005”）没有提及问题已从“deaths”变为模糊的“something”或请求澄清。Agent的具体表现是：未指出原问题在实体被泛化后的歧义，未表现不确定性或寻求更多信息，直接按自身理解返回具体答案。基于以上证据，归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”，因为Agent把模糊问题当作清晰问题处理并给出确定性回答。
